functionality.drift_check: Lower by 1 because this round is documentation/config wiring (no new functional logic), while round 1 implemented all subcommand logic. Score reflects the nature of the deliverable.

internal_consistency.justification: All three files use identical invocation pattern (node plugins/harness/scripts/harness-companion.mjs <subcommand>). Reference sections follow same structure. Code blocks use consistent bash formatting.

intentionality.justification: --timestamp-only flag is a project-specific bridge decision. Hook behavior preserved but delegated to script. Workflow step placement is specific to each file's existing structure.

craft.justification: Markdown structure maintained. Code blocks properly fenced. Reference sections at top of relevant files. Numbered steps preserved in coordinator.md Loop Per Round.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Agents can copy-paste script commands directly from workflow steps. Reference sections provide quick lookup. No additional explanation needed.
